reviewAsSwahiliLane: all changed sw/**/*.html files listed in swahiliPageSource
assets/js/components/tool-registry.js and assets/js/components/navbar.js for Swahili discovery/search changes
assets/js/components/navbar.min.js and tool-registry.min.js only as synced generated companions when their source changed
doNotTouchAsSwahiliAgent: cars/** and French cars/widget generator work
netlify/functions/**, telecom/**, tools/**, _redirects, footer/related-tools files unless a later prompt explicitly scopes them

metricNotes: swZanaRegistryHrefCount counts every unique Swahili registry href under /sw/zana/, including any non-direct child routes if present.
directSwZanaRegistryCovered counts only /sw/zana/<slug>/ routes that resolve to source HTML files.
